name: Grilled Chicken and Red Pepper Taco
recipeIngredient: 1 Med red onion, peeled and chopped
1/2 cup Cooked black beans (about 2 cups cooked)
1/4 cup Sour cream or non-fat yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grill the chicken breasts to an even thickness. Grill or broil for about 4 minutes on each side until cooked through, but not dried out.
2. Grill the peppers at the same time as the chicken. Slice and set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the bell peppers, celery, onion, black beans, and cilantro.
4. In a separate jar with a tight-fitting lid, mix together 1/4 cup balsamic vinegar, 1/4 cup oil, 1/4 cup orange juice, 1/4 cup lime juice, 2 cloves garlic, 1 tsp ground coriander seed, 1/2 tsp pepper, and 1/2 tsp salt.
5. Pour the dressing over the vegetables and marinate for 1 hour at room temperature.
6. Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Grill the tortillas for about 30 seconds on each side to soften.
7. To serve, place chicken in the center of each tortilla. Top with vegetables and their dressing, then roll into a cylinder. Serve immediately; the dish should be at room temperature.
8. Note: The chicken breasts, vegetable mixture, and dressing can all be prepared ahead of time. Do not marinate the vegetables for more than 1 hour. Reheat the chicken in a 300°F oven for 15 minutes before serving.
